rare_classes.6: Only 87 raw samples (SQL Injection only) — heavy SMOTE required in step4_split.py

notes.column_mismatch: 02-20-2018.csv has 84 cols with Flow ID, Src IP, Src Port, Dst IP — step1_merge.py drops these to align all files to 80 cols
notes.junk_rows: 02-16-2018.csv, 02-28-2018.csv, 03-01-2018.csv contain duplicate header rows with value 'Label' — dropped in step2_clean.py
notes.infiltration_removed: Class 5 (Infiltration) removed from signature model — handled entirely by Isolation Forest anomaly model in Fusion layer
notes.class_remapping: Infiltration removed — WebAttack remapped from 6 to 5. Final classes: 0=Benign, 1=BruteForce, 2=DoS, 3=DDoS, 4=Bot, 5=WebAttack
